name: Algorand Integration
description: Algorand blockchain integration with MCP and skills — by GoPlausible

setup.summary: Sync workspace memory, register algorand-mcp with mcporter, and add the plugin to OpenClaw's allow list.

postSetup.message: Restart the OpenClaw gateway to apply changes. algorand-mcp is auto-registered in ~/.mcporter/mcporter.json on first load. x402 payments are handled by algorand-mcp's `x402_discover_payment_requirements` and `make_http_request_with_x402` tools.
